creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Which version of x11/xcb-util are you using ?

If it's x11/xcb-util v0.3.8 downgrade to v0.3.6 [1].

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cvsweb.cgi/ports/x11/xcb-util/Makefile?rev=1.17
